nl_query: Show the complete faculty eligibility and performance chain: faculty name, department, courses they are mapped to, boards they are in the pool for, scripts assigned, scripts submitted, and their average evaluation speed.
failed_sql:
SELECT fc.name AS faculty_name, au.code AS course_code, au.name AS course_name, b.id AS board_id, sa.id AS script_assignment_id, a.id AS script_id, a.evaluation_status, AVG(DISTINCT (EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM a.published_at - a.created_at))) AS average_evaluation_speed
FROM   faculty_course_mapping fcm
JOIN   faculty_cache         fc  ON fc.employee_id = fcm.employee_id
JOIN   academic_unit         au  ON au.id           = fcm.course_id
JOIN   board                 b   ON b.course_id = au.id
JOIN   script_assignment      sa ON sa.evaluator_id = fc.employee_id AND sa.is_active = TRUE
JOIN   answer_script      a   ON a.id           = sa.script_id
WHERE  a.evaluation_status = 'SUBMITTED'
GROUP  BY fc.name, au.code, au.name, b.id, sa.id, a.id
ORDER  BY average_evaluation_speed DESC;
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): script_assignment.created_at. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
